scope: M81-M84 Round of 32 90-minute quantitative predictions; no betting advice

method.engine: Independent Poisson from final xG, 0-0 to 5-5 matrix with tail retained.
method.market_treatment: No odds shift because same-source odds snapshot is missing.
method.lineup_treatment: Data-collector probable XI retained for all eight teams; official T-75 XI remains missing.
method.tactical_treatment: Tactics-coach package is available but older than data; absorbed with conservative caps.

factor_weights.notes: Market weight set to 0.00 because same-source odds are missing; tactics are capped because tactics-coach packet is missing.

handoff_notes: data-collector 已吸收，modeler 不再是 fallback missing-data 版本。
tactics-coach 可用但旧于 data，主线程若取得新版 tactics 可要求二次微调。
展示层读取 xG 时使用 expected_goals.final.team_a/team_b/total，兼容字段为 expected_goals.team_a_xg/team_b_xg/total_xg。
